name: io.github.augbastos/deputy-mcp
title: Deputy
description: MCP server for Deputy workforce management: rosters, timesheets, and shift tools

environmentVariables.name: DEPUTY_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Auth mode A (full access): Deputy permanent token (needs an admin access level). Pair with DEPUTY_BASE_URL. Provide ONE of the three auth modes: A (token), B (OAuth: run 'deputy-mcp login' with the OAuth vars), or C (DEPUTY_CALENDAR_URL, roster-only).

environmentVariables.name: DEPUTY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Auth mode A only: your Deputy install URL, e.g. https://your-company.eu.deputy.com. Not needed for OAuth or iCal mode.

environmentVariables.name: DEPUTY_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Auth mode B (OAuth, no admin needed): client id of an app registered at once.deputy.com/my/oauth_clients (redirect http://localhost:8823/callback). Then run 'deputy-mcp login'.

environmentVariables.name: DEPUTY_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Auth mode B (OAuth): client secret of the registered OAuth app. Used only to mint/refresh your access token via 'deputy-mcp login'.

environmentVariables.name: DEPUTY_CALENDAR_URL
environmentVariables.description: Auth mode C (iCal, roster-only, no API token): your personal Deputy calendar feed URL (My Schedule -> subscribe/export). Carries a feed token, so treat as a secret.

environmentVariables.name: DEPUTY_ALLOW_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to enable the opt-in write tools (auth mode A/B only). Read-only by default.
